title: Conditional Date Feature

posts.author: Kasper (Jesse Churchill)
posts.cookedHtml:
A simple condition that tells Monday to calculate whether a date has or has not passed yet, before completing an action.

  • Currently Monday can only base all calculations on an exact date, such as:
  • When an an exact date arrives.
  • Or 6 months before this exact date.
  • Or 1 year after this exact date.

Alternatively, they can allow us to extend the 7 day limit of this automation below which is basically my same request. But ideally the 7 day part would be eliminated altogether/optional and the “every day” part should also be optional/changable. I may only want the automation to trigger once, the first day the condition is met.
